content:
# Minitab

**Summary**: Statistical software used for data analysis and Design of Experiments (DOE).

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] used Minitab to perform a half-factorial design to identify significant factors in adsorption.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] used Minitab to design the experiment and analyze the response of various parameters on mercury removal.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] used Minitab to design the experiment and analyze the response of various parameters on mercury removal.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The Pareto chart showed that dosage had the highest effect on the percentage removal of DBT. ([[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015, p. 124]])

- The Pareto plot showed that initial concentration, flowrate, and time were the most significant factors in the removal process. ([[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016, p. 143]])
